title: Real Minecraft
description:
Actual Minecraf







(Minecraft mod pack for quality vanilla plus experience, includes technology mods that aren't too overbearing, farming and substituents of such (brewery, cooking, etc.), as well as natural new mobs.)
body:
Realest Minecraft Experience. 






Intended for Vanilla plus experience on a fabric server.

1.0 is significantly more vanilla plus, 
2.0 onwards overhauled this pack, adding **_Ice and Fire_**, adding a fantasy flare.


Adds many new blocks for decor like furniture and stuff, as well as other aestically pleasing features in world gen and structures.

New mobs including overhauls to the creepers and endermen that are based on biome. Adds all mobs that were to be added in mob votes.

A less vanilla plus, but great addition of overhauled journey to the end, instead of getting a bunch of eyes of ender, you need to find many unique eyes, so that people dont immidietely get to the end. 

Many farming, cooking and other similar features for variety in crops and food.

Horses can be bonded with and equipped with some new things.

Many technologies that aren't immiedietely overbearing. And the create mod for whatever you ever wanted to make pretty much.

Quality of life (chat features, third person, ui changes, etc.) and performance mods, so that things will run smooth.

Misc - Instruments, gravestones, backpacks, dynamic lights, animations, and many many more.
